name: Stripe
problem: Businesses found it difficult to accept online payments globally due to fragmented payment systems and complex banking integrations.
solution: Stripe provides developer-friendly APIs and financial infrastructure that allow businesses to accept payments, manage subscriptions, handle payouts, and automate financial operations.
market_size: Global digital payments market (multi-trillion dollar opportunity).
revenue_model: Transaction fees, billing products, payment processing, financial services, and enterprise solutions.

name: Notion
problem: Teams and individuals used multiple disconnected tools for notes, documents, task management, and collaboration.
solution: Notion offers an all-in-one workspace combining documents, databases, wikis, project management, AI writing, and collaboration.
market_size: Global productivity and collaboration software market.
revenue_model: Freemium SaaS with paid Personal, Plus, Business, and Enterprise subscriptions.

name: Canva
problem: Professional graphic design software was expensive and difficult for non-designers.
solution: Canva provides an intuitive drag-and-drop design platform with templates, AI-powered design tools, and collaboration features.
market_size: Global graphic design and visual content creation market.
revenue_model: Freemium subscriptions (Canva Pro, Teams, Enterprise), templates, and AI features.

name: Airbnb
problem: Travelers struggled to find affordable, unique accommodations while property owners had unused living space.
solution: Airbnb connects hosts with travelers through an online marketplace for short-term rentals and unique experiences.
revenue_model: Service fees charged to guests and hosts on each booking.

name: Figma
problem: Design teams faced collaboration issues with desktop-based design software and file version conflicts.
solution: Figma is a cloud-based collaborative design platform that enables real-time UI/UX design, prototyping, and developer handoff.
revenue_model: Freemium SaaS subscriptions with Professional, Organization, and Enterprise plans.

name: OpenAI
problem: Businesses and developers lacked access to powerful, production-ready artificial intelligence models.
solution: OpenAI develops advanced AI models and APIs for text, image, audio, reasoning, coding, and automation applications.
revenue_model: API usage pricing, ChatGPT subscriptions, enterprise licensing, and business solutions.

name: Rippling
problem: Companies managed HR, payroll, IT, and employee identity across multiple disconnected systems.
solution: Rippling unifies HR, payroll, benefits, identity management, device management, and IT automation into one platform.
market_size: Global HR technology and workforce management software market.
revenue_model: Subscription-based SaaS with modular pricing for HR, IT, payroll, and finance products.
